core_principles: Calm Productivity: Reduce cognitive load for overwhelmed users.
Organic Structure: Use warm tones to make structured tasks feel achievable, not clinical.
Frictionless Interactions: Every interaction should feel smooth and reassuring.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy with Bento Grid layout for Dashboards.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Padding must be generous. p-6 or p-8 inside cards to prevent text collision. Use p-4 for smaller elements.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align paragraphs and dense content for readability. Only center in the Focus Room.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-bold
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-semibold
scales.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-semibold text-[#575E56]

surfaces.dashboard_cards: bg-[#F9F8F6] border border-[#2D372B]/10 rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
surfaces.inputs: bg-[#F2F0EA] border border-[#2D372B]/10 rounded-xl focus:bg-[#F9F8F6] focus:border-[#C27A63] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C27A63]/20 transition-all

buttons.primary: bg-[#C27A63] text-[#F9F8F6] rounded-xl hover:bg-[#A6634D] transition-colors shadow-sm font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-[#E8E5DF] text-[#1A1D1A] rounded-xl hover:bg-[#DEDAD2] transition-colors font-medium
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border border-[#2D372B]/20 text-[#1A1D1A] rounded-xl hover:bg-[#2D372B]/5 transition-colors font-medium

animation_and_motion.micro_interactions: Smooth 200ms transitions on all hover states. Transform -translate-y-1 for interactive cards.
animation_and_motion.focus_ring: Slow, breathing circular animation for Pomodoro timer.

icons.style: Clean, rounded, and consistent stroke weight (1.5px).

images.description: Minimalist 3D abstract composition of smooth clay spheres and terracota arches against a soft bone-white background. Used for Landing/Auth page background.
images.usage: Use as a background cover with an opacity overlay to keep text highly legible.

images.description: Close up of a Zen garden sand ripples with a single smooth black river stone. Warm sage tint.
images.usage: Use as full-screen background in the Focus Room view with a dark overlay or vignette for deep focus.

shadcn_ui: Use Shadcn components for all interactive elements (Select, Dropdown, Dialog, Tabs).
Modify default border-radii from standard Shadcn to rounded-xl (12px) or rounded-2xl (16px) for an organic feel.
Remove heavy default shadows and replace them with subtle ambient shadows.
data_testid: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.
Use kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='start-pomodoro-button').
charts: Use Recharts (or Shadcn Chart wrapper) for Analytics.
Colors must strictly adhere to the organic palette (Terracotta, Sage Green, Warning Yellow, Stone).
Remove grid lines on charts for a cleaner, calmer look. Keep only minimal axes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use default Inter font for headings. Setup Manrope and Figtree in Tailwind config via Google Fonts.
Build the dashboard using CSS Grid with bento-style layouts (col-span strategies).
Avoid complete transparency for overlays; always use blur (glassmorphism) or solid opacity.
For the Gemini Chat Advisor, ensure the message bubbles have subtle rounded corners with higher contrast for user messages.
Make sure all files use .js extension instead of .tsx since this is a JS project setup.
